title: Wynnic Enchantments Helper
description: A helper mod for Wynnic Enchantments modpack
body:
A helper mod for [Wynnic Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/modpack/wynnicenchantments) modpack. Features are specialized for that modpack.

## Features:
- Fancy Menu Placeholder Integration
  | Placeholder name    | Description           |
  |---------------------|:---------------------:|
  | wynncraft-news      | Returns news fetched from Wynncraft API (or -1 if unavailable)              |
  | wynncraft-remove-badge-path            | Removes badge path from given string, leaving only badge name              |
  | we-changelog            | Returns latest changelog of Wynnic Enchantments fetched from Modrinth (or localized unavailable text if unavailable)             |
  | we-version            | Returns latest version number of Wynnic Enchantments fetched from Modrinth (or -1 if unavailable)             |
  | wynntils-changelog            | Returns latest changelog of Wynntils for fabric fetched from Modrinth (or localized unavailable text if unavailable)             |
  | wynntils-version            | Returns latest version number of Wynntils for fabric fetched from Modrinth (or -1 if unavailable)             |
   - All of these Placeholders are placed in dedicated `WE Helper` category

- Wynntils integration
  - All features appear in Wynntils settings screen and have a special mark next to their name, making it easy to see which one comes from Wynnic Enchantments and which is normal Wynntils feature.
  - Player Info Overlay: Inspired by popular MMORPG games design, this overlay displays yours HP and Mana with your character's portrait. Like many settings in Wynntils, this overlay has some of them too, like Texture, Hp to Mana bar ratio, multiple option regarding player portrait and more.
![Screenshot of the default Player Info Overlay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/j4Oj7w7G/images/279bb8b84b0d6e506fb58ca2dcb635aae8de14d9.png)
  - Team Info Overlay: Similar in style of Player Info Overlay, this overlay shows your party members connected to Hades, including their HP and mana as well as their animated portrait. Contains multiple settings like font size, bar ratio, whether to render player portrait and player rotation.
![Screenshot of the preview for Team Info Overlay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/j4Oj7w7G/images/55da283ebb7b18e677985b1d892808d11e314971.png)
  - Player rendering in both of these overlays is done via Fancy Entity Renderer mod


## Mentions and Attributions
- Jonathan Hedley & jsoup contributors. jsoup: Java HTML Parser (2009–present). Available at: https://jsoup.org
   - This mod includes Jsoup a Java library which is used to parse HTML from Wynncraft News.
- Special thanks to Wynntils Team for helping me create this mod as well as Palette for inspiration for making this mod
